calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-29-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw, via Zoom, for and with Terry Lam, Administrator.

The court confirms with counsel that the $170,000 bond remains in place and that approximately $51,000 remains in the estate and points the court to her declaration filed on Feb-02-2022. The court notes that it doesn't appear as though a courtesy copy of the declaration was ever delivered to the court.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Glisson. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-25-2022 Continued To Mar-01-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw, via ZOOM, for Terry Lam, Personal Representative.

The court reminds Ms. Hinshaw that there have been no filed responses to the Examiner's notes. Ms. Hinshaw reports that she has been ill which has caused some delay in responding. Ms. Hinshaw provides additional oral testimony regarding the delay in replying. The court advises Ms. Hinshaw to address the notes as best she can and to formally file her responses.

After additional discussion, the Accounting Petition is continued to Mar-01-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-16-2021 Continued To Dec-14-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw, via ZOOM, for Terry Lam, Administrator.

The court advises counsel that there was no bank statement included as exhibit D in her supplement. Counsel reports that the bank statement was included as exhibit C and that her paralegal left her firm but that she has responses to most of the Examiner's notes but asks or additional time to gather and submit them for filing.

The Accounting Petition is continued to Dec-14-2021 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Order Terminating Proceedings (No Assets Subject To Administration), Directing Return Of Funds (Prob. Code Sec. 850) And Discharging Administrator Cta
Off Calendar Feb-02-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw appeared by zoom for Terry Lam (Administrator).

The Court stated that it sees no waiver of account or consent filed by Puiseng Lam. Ms. Hinshaw stated that she has not been able to reach Terry Lam, that she is a professional traveler and that Ms. Lam may be traveling. The Court stated that the petition either has to be amended as an account or be taken off calendar. Ms. Hinshaw stated that she is fine with taking the petition off calendar and starting over. The Petition for Order Terminating Proceedings is off calendar. Status on close of estate is set for March 9, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw appeared by zoom for Terry Lam (Administrator).

The Court questions status of bond and stated that there has been no response to the Probate Examiner's notes. Ms. Hinshaw stated that the issue if bond was not on the list from the Probate Examiner, that she will check on it and apologized to the Court stating that this case has been a problem child. In addition, Ms. Hinshaw stated that the remainder beneficiary is holding up the waiver of account, that she has corrected the missing page on the consents, that it was e-filed yesterday and suggested a 45-day continuance. The Petition for Order Terminating Proceedings is continued to November 25, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Caroline Hinshaw for Administrator, Terry Lam.

Ms. Hinshaw stated there is a hearing date of March 11, 2020 in case # PTR-20-303423, that all family members except one is in agreement with the distribution and requested to get exemption trust matter before the court, before addressing this matter.
